description: A plain, undesigned candid color photograph of a federal arrest, with no headline text, slogans, agency seal overlay, or graphic styling added to the image. In a fluorescent-lit institutional hallway (cinderblock walls, drop ceiling, a green-lit 'EXIT' sign over a door), a handcuffed man in a dark green/olive shirt and tan cargo shorts stands in the center facing the camera, flanked by four law-enforcement officers who all face away from the camera so their jacket backs are visible. The jackets read, left to right: 'ATF POLICE' (yellow lettering), 'POLICE ERO,' 'POLICE HSI,' and 'POLICE U.S. MARSHAL'. The frame shows a single detainee surrounded by officers. Per the tweet it depicts Luis Jorge Chavez-Peraza of El Salvador, arrested by ICE/HSI's Integrated Operations Group in Los Angeles.
notable_text: ATF POLICE / POLICE ERO / POLICE HSI / POLICE U.S. MARSHAL / EXIT
